Further Content: Transcript of this video Prebid.js Events All videos How to Integrate an Analytics Adapter Each analytics provider has specific instructions for using their system, but these are the general steps: Create an account with the analytics vendor and obtain the necessary IDs Build Prebid.js package with the vendor's analytics adapter
